theme: Romantic couple's story — paper-cut layered cardboard, blush-pink paper sky, hearts, hot-air balloon, seaside village, lamplight, wine/dusty-rose palette
notes: Assets marked 'placeholder' are copies of kids_fantasy assets and must be replaced with romance-themed art (pink clouds, heart sparkles).

heroSlots._doc: Canonical hero slot grammar shared by every style folder. Filenames are lowercase: {slot}.webp, {slot}_{device}.webp, {slot}_{device}_{locale}.webp, person{n}_{locale}.webp. Locale fallback chain at build time: exact locale -> en-US -> unsuffixed -> first available.

assets.usage: PaperCutHero sky band — left floater, in front of cloud_left, slightly below
assets.description: Red and cream striped hot-air balloon, papercut style, floating left side of sky

assets.usage: PaperCutHero sky band — right floater, in front of cloud_right, slightly below
assets.description: Pink paper hearts and cloud cluster, papercut style, right side of sky

assets.usage: PaperCutHero sky band — top-left background cloud, behind sky_left
assets.description: Layered paper cloud, soft cream tones. PLACEHOLDER: copy of kids_fantasy cloud; final art should be blush-pink romance cloud.

assets.usage: PaperCutHero sky band — top-right background cloud, behind sky_right
assets.description: Layered paper cloud, soft cream tones. PLACEHOLDER: copy of kids_fantasy cloud; final art should be blush-pink romance cloud.

assets.usage: PaperCutHero sky band — twinkle cluster centered above the page title
assets.description: Cluster of gold stars. PLACEHOLDER: copy of kids_fantasy sparkles; final art should mix a gold star with small paper hearts.
